MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian. Luis G. Molina, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Juan Gomez and there being no appearance by Defendant, Jose Ortiz, the case is removed from settlement conference, request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
